findings.summary: Fresh homeowner leads unavailable. Craigslist shows contractor advertisements only. B2B strategy (property managers) shows active outreach.
findings.craigslistStatus: No real homeowner leads in past 3 days — all recent posts are contractor service ads
technicalConstraints: Browser automation requires manual Chrome extension attachment (not available to subagent)
Direct web scraping blocked in current environment
Platform APIs (Craigslist, Nextdoor, Facebook) require authentication or are blocked

dataSources.craigslist-latest.json: 2026-03-01 16:55 - 10 contractor listings (service providers, not homeowners seeking services)
dataSources.facebook-leads-latest.json: 2026-03-01 23:04 - General group posts, not construction leads
dataSources.reddit-latest.json: 2026-02-27 - Home improvement discussions, not actionable leads
dataSources.nextdoor-latest.json: 2026-02-27 - Contractor business pages, not homeowner requests

alternativeStrategy.observation: Valencia's outreach log shows active B2B strategy targeting property management companies

activeTargets.name: CL3 Property Management
activeTargets.notes: Lincoln Park based, 10+ years, manages condos and small multi-family

activeTargets.name: Root Property Group
activeTargets.notes: Lincoln Square, North Side focused, small-to-mid, independent

activeTargets.name: Be Realty Group
activeTargets.notes: Lakeview area, small operation with property management arm

activeTargets.name: High Fidelity Property Management
activeTargets.notes: Lincoln Park based, 15+ years, manages condos and single-family

recommendation: Direct homeowner lead generation via Craigslist/Nextdoor/Facebook appears exhausted for immediate ROI. Valencia's current B2B property manager outreach (18+ active targets with personalized emails) appears to be the more viable strategy. These companies have recurring renovation and turnover needs.
nextSteps: Execute follow-ups on 5 property managers with overdue follow-up dates (3/1-3/2)
Consider paid advertising (Facebook/Google local) for direct homeowner capture if B2B doesn't yield results
Alternative: Compile 'homeowner inquiry' leads from property manager partnerships once relationships established
